title: Cracker on the cards for Saturday
description: GEORGE NEWS - A mouth-watering clash is on...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A mouth-watering clash is on the cards for Saturday when Sussex and Pacaltsdorp United will lock horns at D'Almeida to determine who will take on Union Stars in the premier league final.


> The two clubs, that finished second and third on the log, respectively, will battle it out in the qualifying fixture to advance to the final on 15 March.


Pacaltsdorp is the two-time defending champions while Sussex has been promoted to the premier league at the beginning of the season.

The fixtures for the weekend are:

Saturday 8 March

Premier league qualifier: Sussex vs Pacaltsdorp United

Reserve Division 1: Dysselsdorp vs Western Hope, Pacaltsdorp United B vs Blanco, Hartenbos vs Mayflower, Albertinia vs Melkhoutfontein

Sunday 9 March

Reserve Division 2: Beaufort West A vs Western Hope B, Pacaltsdorp United C vs George D, George C vs Knysna Cavaliers B

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
